team.teamName: The Times They Are A Changin'

posture.rationale: Global pctile 28.9% and a bottom-half mini-league seat with 11 rounds left: expected rank gain leans toward higher-variance, differentiated picks — favouring lower-ownership riders at comparable EV over mirroring the consensus template.

decision.summary: SECOND OPINION (Tue 14 Jul ~22:07Z) — CHANGED, 2 swaps on top of the evening reshape. Transition classified FIRST: S10 mountain -> S11-S12 flat = HARD FLIP (doctrine calendar; substrate block_boundary=false is the known intra-block flag artifact). The evening run reshaped 5/8; hard-flip class warrants 6-8, so I hunted the missing swaps and found them in the filler slots. CORE UPHELD: Merlier CAPTAIN (unanimous chalk — bet365 4/7, Kalshi ~57%, 5-star Axelgaard, all 7 expert boards, capC #1 in pool by 25%), plus Kooij, Kanter, Waerenskjold and Eenkhoorn (+54k/+45k realized — a WORKING Soudal holdbonus stack with Merlier, not dead filler). PEDERSEN HELD after a full construct-and-price: the Pedersen->Girmay upgrade looked strong on every forward board but is REFUTED — (a) it is verbatim the round-trip the 12-Jul run pre-registered as forbidden absent fresh info, and the 'fresh' S7/S8 data was already visible when that decision was made; (b) on the last hilly stage Pedersen made +245k while Girmay LOST 18k, so Pedersen is the free S13 crossover bridge and Girmay is a bunch-sprint-only asset; (c) net edge over S11-S13 is negative once the ~113k S13 re-buy fee is booked. CHANGED: sold the two dead fillers. Barguil is value-negative on EVERY terrain (-3k flat, -51k hilly, -90k mountain) — the 'keep him as a climber for S13/S14' case is empirically dead. Dillier's Alpecin-holdbonus thesis never paid (Philipsen top-3 zero times). Bought Bittner (Picnic's #1 sprinter, own lead-out train, +118k/+200k realized) and Van Asbroeck (10th on S7). METHOD NOTE: the EV substrate is a pure stage-WIN model (e_stage ~= p_stage x 600-740k) and floors 91% of the pool at 2,313 (matchRate 0.086), so it CANNOT discriminate fillers — that is why the evening run picked two negative ones. I priced every slot off REALIZED kr growth from consecutive snapshots instead (method validated: growth == the kr scoring table exactly, e.g. Girmay S8 = 150k for 2nd + 68 sprint pts x 3,000 = 354,000 = the observed delta). CAUTION for future runs: the S5 delta is UNUSABLE — snap4->snap5 is 0k for all 182 riders (holdet settles late), so snap5->snap6 double-books S4+S5; that is what makes Pedersen's +753k look like flat earnings when it is really his S4 stage WIN. FUNDING: bank 3,543,690 + sells 4,750,000 = 8,293,690 vs buys 8,183,000 + fees 81,830 -> bank after 28,860. Thin but SAFE: live prices verified byte-identical to the 20:31Z snapshot, and holdet only re-prices at stage settlement (S10 already settled; none lands before the 11:50Z close). LEGAL: 8 riders, captain in team, <=2 per real team (Soudal QS 2-up: Merlier+Eenkhoorn; Picnic back to 1 once Barguil goes). DNS: triple-verified clean — 0 isOut across the 175-rider pool, owned-dns.json out:[] at 21:21Z, and two independent web sweeps (only Tour exit at S10 = Trentin, unowned; none of the 8 in any S10 crash/medical report). VERIFY: 2 web-research agents + 3 adversarial refuters; the Girmay swap was killed outright and this one was downgraded from +482k to ~+265k (Bittner ~110k/stage, Van Asbroeck ~48k/stage once both were shown to have blanked S5) — still clears the 1.2x fee bar by 2.7x. FORWARD: S12 flat = FREEZE (Waerenskjold and Bittner must hold through S12 to amortise their fees). S13 hilly boundary Thu evening = block entry: Pedersen carries free, rotate the sprint cards out, and RE-BUY POGACAR for the S14-S15 mountain block. ENGINEERING RISK for that run: Pogacar's fused.p_gc is 0 (both GC-odds feeds dead), collapsing his e_stage to the 2,313 floor — a 54x under-credit of a rider banking a MEASURED +150k/stage. Do not let that bug talk the brain out of the anchor re-buy. Background tasks filed for the p_gc floor and the jersey-holder EV blind spot.

swaps.rationale: SECOND-OPINION, completing the S10 mountain -> S11-S12 flat HARD FLIP (evening run reshaped only 5/8; class warrants 6-8). Barguil is not neutral ballast — he is MEASURED value-NEGATIVE on every terrain: -3k/-3k on the two clean flat stages, -51k on hilly S9, -90k on mountain S10. There is no block in which he earns. Bittner is Picnic PostNL's designated sprinter with a dedicated lead-out (Degenkolb/van den Berg/Markl), realized +118k (S7) and +200k (S8, ~5th) with 100% self-generated growth (Picnic took zero holdbonus on any flat stage). Adversarially downgraded from +159k to a fair ~110k/stage because he blanked the S5 Pau sprint. Named an S11 contender by previews; field is buying him (+2.37pp tonight). Fee 53,830 vs ~226k expected over S11+S12.

Dillier was bought this evening on an 'Alpecin holdbonus tail via the Philipsen train' thesis that is empirically dead — Philipsen has NOT been top-3 on any flat stage, so Alpecin has paid ZERO holdbonus all Tour; Dillier's realized flat growth is -6k/-9k (and -90k on S10). The ~21k fee is sunk and correctly irrelevant to the forward decision. Van Asbroeck (NSN) finished 10th on S7 (web-confirmed) for +175k, and +48k on S8. Honest estimate ~48k/stage after adversarial haircut (he blanked S5, and roughly half his S7 was Girmay-coattail holdbonus) — but the leg is near-costless optionality precisely BECAUSE Dillier is negative. He is the most expensive rider that fits alongside Bittner and is the max-EV fundable partner (Huub Artz, the better filler, is short by 155k).

brainJournal.text: 2026-07-14T19:56:22Z (evening definitive, S11 plan) — **RESHAPED 5/8 (HARD FLIP, S10 mountain → S11-S12 flat block)** S11 Vichy→Nevers 161.3km genuine bunch sprint (last climb 37.9km out, dry, low echelon risk; closes 15 Jul ~11:50Z). ANCHOR-LEASED **Pogačar OUT** (after his S10 Le Lioran WIN + yellow +3:36; re-buy guarded at the S13 boundary, ~4M+ headroom even post-win re-price) + sold Healy/Vacek/Castrillo/Charmig (off-profile ≥2 stages). BOUGHT **Merlier (CAPTAIN — bet365 4-7 ~64%, unanimous #1 ×3 boards, eS 128.8k conf 1.0)**, Kooij (7-2 #2 chalk, dominates winless/fatigue-flagged Philipsen), Wærenskjold (25-1; stale no-re-buy constraint OVERRIDDEN — premise died with the 12-Jul Girmay sale, adjudicated sound by 2 verify lenses; MUST hold through S12 for the fee bar), Eenkhoorn (SQS holdbonus stack w/ Merlier), Dillier (Alpecin filler). KEPT Kanter (16-1, points 5th) + Pedersen (GREEN 268, +25 intermediate today, S13 crossover 0.33) + Barguil (ballast). Funded: sells 37.011M + bank 327,413 → buys 34.666M + fee 346.7k, bank after ~2.326M (direction-safe, pre-S10-processing prices). DNS: watched-riders ALL CLEAR web-verified 3-source (only exit today = Trentin, unowned); pool isOut vacuous (identity merge still dead — chip filed 14-Jul), verified independently. Girmay #3 chalk unfundable alongside Merlier+Kooij in any legal 5-sell shape (verified exhaustively). ULTRACODE: 2 web-research + 3 adversarial verify agents = APPROVE×3 high-conf (1 spelling fix). 20:45 research sweep MISSING tonight (latest.md 09:15) — compensated with live web research; converge had been skipping since 18:36 on "plan stage 10 != upcoming 11" → this write unblocks trading. FORWARD: S12 = FREEZE; Thu evening S13 hilly boundary = Vacek/Healy re-buy candidates, Pogačar re-buy decision (S13 p15 0.47/S14 0.70). matchRateAtWrite 0.0852 (sprint board carries real conf 0.82-1.0).

2026-07-13T23:05:13Z (night pass, third tonight) — **FROZE** (GC-internal soft transition S9 hilly→S10 mountain; freeze ADVERSARIALLY RE-VERIFIED, 0/3 skeptic lenses refuted, all HIGH). S10 Le Lioran (Bastille Day, window closes 11:10Z). Concur with 19:40Z definitive + 21:23Z/22:36Z second opinions — same 8, captain Pogacar (eS 137,406 conf 0.95, RP 4/7 ~64%, pool #1 by 1.76×). NEW: exhaustive swap enumeration (verify agent) — ALL 748 funded 2-per-team-legal single swaps fail the 1.2×-fee bar (best short 23.6k pre-round-trip-fee); Vingegaard unfundable by 447k, Del Toro short 27k + 4× under bar. **REAL DEFECT FOUND & CHIPPED: snapshot identity merge DEAD this run (persons=[] + statistik fullName null ⇒ isOut attached to 0/176 pool rows — pool-level "0 isOut" was VACUOUSLY true).** DNS safety confirmed 3 independent ways instead: market.players price-join (8/8 owned isOut=false; 30 isOut pids all non-owned), pool == exactly the 176 non-out players, grey-name owned-dns.json fresh 22:37Z + empty. OPS: live==plan every full tick through 22:52 local; 00:52 iframe-not-found = known self-recovering transient (4th occurrence); freeze needs no trades. Bank 327,413. Rewrite refreshes the 24h gate through close. Forward: Tue evening = S10→S11 HARD FLIP (full sprint reshape, anchor-lease decision on Pogacar, sprint-chalk captain bought fresh). matchRate 0.6875.

2026-07-13T19:40:19Z (REST-DAY evening definitive) — **FROZE (GC-internal soft transition, freeze RE-EARNED on sharp data)** S10 Aurillac→Le Lioran (Bastille Day 14 Jul; window closes 11:10Z). The promised fresh-odds re-sizing: matchRate 0.165→**0.6875** (RP/bet365 S10 board ingested: Pogacar 4/7 ~64%, Del Toro 9/1, Carapaz 11/1, Vingegaard 18/1) and the 12-Jul freeze SURVIVES on real numbers. 3-agent adversarial verify (swap-search / captain / legality-ops) = **0 refuted, all HIGH**: full-pool scan finds NO funded swap within an order of magnitude of the 1.2×-fee doctrine bar for a 1-day climber hold (best ratios Vingegaard 0.41×, Del Toro 0.25×; only funded 2-swap Charmig+Vacek→Paret-Peintre+fodder nets +12.7k vs 85.3k bar AND strands Vacek's squad-best S13 read p15 0.57). CAPTAIN **Pogacar** held (eS 137,406 conf 0.95 p15 0.822 pool-#1, unanimous 9/9 sources); strategy.md's 24/25-Pedersen-captain WATCH evaluated & not followed (Pedersen best-case doubled marginal ~55-70k < half Pogacar; observation likely stale mid-window snapshot) — confirm/kill vs S10 actual tomorrow. Research deltas: Vacek CORRECTED to GC 24th +16:58 (GC floor dead; pure S13+Lidl hold, top S11-flip rotation candidate); Castrillo identity RESOLVED (pool has exactly one: Pablo, Movistar = ours; researcher's Álvaro warning was the confusion); Kalshi TLS-blocked tonight (RP corroborates, no signal lost). Sprinters held (single-island rule; Pedersen GREEN 268 +45, Kanter points 5th). 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide; no new abandons; Healy heat = soft watch. Rewrite was MANDATORY (prior plan crossed the 24h gate ~23:21 CEST tonight). Live==plan verified through 21:36 CEST. Bank 327,413. Forward: Tue evening = S10→S11 HARD FLIP (full sprint reshape, anchor-lease Pogacar decision, captain = sprint chalk bought fresh). matchRate 0.6875

2026-07-12T21:21:22Z (evening SECOND-OPINION) — **HELD** S10 Aurillac->Le Lioran (Bastille Day 14 Jul; 13 Jul REST DAY 1; window open to 14 Jul 11:10Z). Concur w/ 19:42Z evening definitive — EARNED FREEZE for a GC-INTERNAL SOFT transition (S9 hilly->S10 mountain, doctrine 1-5; GC core Pogacar fits, squad 6/8 on-profile -> captain-to-chalk + 0 discretionary swaps is IN-class, NOT an under-rotated boundary; the real hard flip is S10->S11 flat block, Tue-night's call). Independently re-derived, did NOT inherit: (1) FUNDING WALL re-priced on CORRECTED LIVE BANK **327,413** (plan cited stale 74,042; ~253k delta = S9 winnings crediting after the 19:42 write) — even at the higher bank the cheapest corroborated upgrade Vacek->Simmons is SHORT 85,667, named climbers Johannessen/Martinez/Seixas short 1.07-6.12M via any legal sell keeping the sprint pair+break breadth; (2) Vacek->Simmons is lateral-to-negative anyway (Simmons conf 0.34, cyclingstage 1-star, classics rouleur; selling Vacek forfeits GC floor + squad-best S13 read + Lidl holdbonus); (3) pre-rest-day protocol — substrate floored (matchRate 0.165, 6/8 owned floored), size from research, let Mon evening upgrade on fresh Kalshi/Axelgaard-optakt/RacingPost-2026 with window open. CAPTAIN Pogacar CONCUR (Kalshi 64% runaway + top of every board + capC 177,324 conf 1.00 pool-#1; floor>every owned ceiling; web-verified S10 previews all #1). Sprinters (Kanter/Pedersen green 268) held per single-off-profile-stage rule (S11-12 sprints in 48h). DEFENSIVE: 0 isOut/0 isOutUnconfirmed pool-wide (176); web-verified withdrawals tracker ends at Traen S7 — NO new abandonment, none owned; all 8 healthy S8-S9; Vacek 'losing form' single-source Axelgaard, healthy, monitor. Legal: 8 riders, only Lidl 2-up, captain in team, funded, bank 327,413. Converge re-ran: live==plan, captain OK, no-op. matchRate 0.165.

2026-07-12T19:42:56Z (evening, S10 plan — pre-rest-day definitive) — **RESHAPED (captain-only; GC-internal soft transition, 0 discretionary swaps)** S10 Aurillac→Le Lioran (Bastille Day 14 Jul, 166.6km/~3,900m, hard uphill finish; 13 Jul = REST DAY 1, window open to 14 Jul 11:10Z). CAPTAIN Pedersen→**POGACAR**: Kalshi 64% runaway (only liquid price, direct browser read), Axelgaard 5★ + cyclingstage top tier, substrate eS 185,259/capC 185,509/conf 1.00 pool-#1; floor (yellow+KOM+GC1 ~150k passive, doubled) > every owned alternative's ceiling even in the ~40-50% break scenario. ROSTER HELD 8/8: S9 hilly→S10 mountain = GC-internal soft (~0-2) and 6/8 already on-profile; 3-agent adversarial verify (roster/captain/ops) returned 0 refuted, all HIGH-conf — funding wall (bank 74,042; Johannessen/Martinez/Seixas unfundable by 1.1-2.8M from any legal sell combo), the only fundable move (Vacek+Barguil→Simmons+filler) nets ~−46k after fees on a single conf-0.365 source AND strands Vacek's squad-best S13 read (p15 0.57), and waiting is FREE (rest day: Racing Post 2026 S10 + fresh Axelgaard optakt + filled Kalshi board all land Mon → tomorrow's evening run re-sizes on sharper data, window still open). Sprinters HELD per single-off-profile-stage rule (Kanter S11/12 p15 0.46/0.48; Pedersen green 268 +45, p15 0.26/0.27). DEFENSIVE: 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide (176); no owned S8-S9 incidents (research-verified); Vacek form-flag (Axelgaard, single-source) noted for tomorrow's re-check. Live ground-truth verified: converge applied captain→Pedersen 13:43 before S9 close; Girmay→Pedersen swap live; snapshot currentTeam (18:28Z) == plan target. matchRate 0.165 (6/8 owned floored — sized from research per post-rest-day protocol). Forward: Mon evening = definitive S10 sizing on fresh odds (candidate Vacek/Barguil upgrade IF corroborated + fundable); S11-12 flat block Wed-Thu (hard flip, anchor-lease Pogacar out if doctrine bar met); S13 hilly (Vacek carries best owned read).

2026-07-12T10:14:04Z (midday, S9 race day) — **CHANGED** S9 Malemort→Ussel hilly break day (window closes 11:35Z; plan written ~10:14Z, 4 trade-capable converge ticks left). ONE SWAP **Girmay → Mads Pedersen** (10.686M) on material overnight news: first live stage market (Kalshi, thin) has Pedersen co-fav with our Vacek (37/39%), Axelgaard repub 5★ Pedersen, ctc 3★; substrate eS 70.3k conf 0.86 pool-#1. 3-agent adversarial verify APPROVE×3 (high). Skeptic CORRECTED my naive +68k math to honest **+~24k decision-weighted [band −11k,+70k]**: +54k S9 (vs steelmanned Girmay ~16k, not floored 1.9k) +24k Lidl 2-up holdbonus (gated OFF in ev.js, real in game) +70k green-jersey carry (Pedersen holds green, 25k/stage) +3k etapebonus **−74k REAL S11-12 sprint downgrade** (Girmay ≈2× Pedersen forward sprint reads — my "keeps sprint slot covered" claim was WRONG) −53.4k half-fee. Negative (−29k) under the plain 1% fee → pure owner-calibration trade (near-zero→swap, 2026-07-10 directive). Girmay = the unique single sell that funds it. Funded to the kroner (bank after 74,042; fee-on-buy-only EMPIRICALLY confirmed from the 8-Jul live trade). CAPTAIN HELD **Vacek** (auditor: mean-equivalent vs captain-Pedersen, ALL tiebreakers → Vacek: fatter tail in the ~75% break scenario, 0% top-team captained differential, chaser 26.2 pctile; capC metric is a MEAN missing his p_gc GC-jump tail; do NOT roll back captain if the swap misses the window). Researcher's lean-HOLD rested on stale ~270k bank (actual 2.09M). 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide. Ops: Mac provably slept 07:00–09:56Z (tick gap) → started self-expiring caffeinate (90 min) so converge ticks survive to close; NO executor run (converge owns application). CONSTRAINTS forward: no Pedersen→Girmay round-trip at S11 absent fresh info; no Wærenskjold re-buy; tomorrow rest day → evening run plans S10 Le Lioran (bank thin 74k, upgrades must self-fund via sells).

2026-07-11T21:23:55Z (evening second-opinion) — **HELD** S9 Malemort→Ussel hilly BREAK day (heat-shortened ~155.5km, window OPEN, closes 12 Jul 11:35Z). Live team already = tonight's evening plan (converge applied it: Wærenskjold→Castrillo done, captain Kanter→**Vacek** done). Ran an independent adversarial search + priced 4 concrete moves, ALL fail net-EV: (1) buy VdP for ceiling (cap 69k, only worthy ceiling-add) — forces selling Girmay/Kanter sprint core needed S11-12 + ~108k fee + break lottery → fee-negative over block; (2) Barguil→Simmons — redundant 5th break card (already at breadth frontier expected_breadth 4.1, 4 corroborated break cards) AND sacrifices S10 summit/S14-15 mountain cover; (3) Charmig→Simmons — the e_h gap (43k vs 7k) is a HORIZON-MULTIPLIER ARTIFACT: S10-12 fusedByStage are identical floors (p15 0.02) so incremental EV = S9 stage only (+20.8k) < half-fee 24k → NEGATIVE even on the owner half-fee dial; (4) Charmig/Barguil→Alaphilippe (cap 42.6k) — single-channel csFav conf 0.39, absent from all 4 S9 star boards + the sharp stars channel (spearman 0.64) → uncorroborated noise, reject on adversarial-verify discipline. CAPTAIN re-audited & CONCUR Vacek: posture CONFIRMED chaser (global pctile 26.2%, mini 6/6, worsening, 14 rounds left → variance correctly rewarded). Pogačar = better PURE-MEAN (~+110-130k/day passive yellow+KOM+GC1 doubled, low-variance) but Vacek = 3★×3 + cyclinguptodate OUTRIGHT-WINNER + GC10 break→GC-jump double-EV tail, robust on the sharpest channel, 0% top-team captained = differential. Chose Vacek over captaining Castrillo despite Castrillo's higher raw e_stage (50k vs 32k): Castrillo is thin single-channel conf 0.39 w/ no GC kicker, Vacek's signal is corroborated + carries the GC-jump upside. Roster HOLD is the EARNED winner of the search, not a default — team was actively reshaped tonight (captain flip + 1 swap already live). DEFENSIVE: no new abandons since S7 Træen (web-verified), 0 owned isOut, all 8 raced S8 healthy. Legal: 8 riders on 8 distinct real teams (≤2/team), captain in team, funded, bank 2.09M. matchRate 0.199 (no S9 betting market — star-boards-only fusion). CONSTRAINT held: do NOT re-buy Wærenskjold for S11 (Girmay+Kanter carry the sprints).

2026-07-11T19:40:39Z (evening, S9 plan) — **CHANGED** S9 Malemort→Ussel hilly BREAK day (heat-shortened ~155.5km, ~38-41°C, window closes 12 Jul 11:35Z). CAPTAIN Kanter→**Vacek** (free): 3★ all three boards + cyclinguptodate outright winner, GC10 double-EV tail; owned honestly as a variance/differential pick — Pogačar's yellow+GC1+KOM passive is the better pure-mean captain by ~20-50k (research's "wastes the 2×" claim is arithmetically wrong; captaincy doubles passive too), but chaser posture + fat break-win tail (+~300k captain marginal) buy the ceiling. 1 SWAP Wærenskjold→Castrillo (4.149M, cs 3★ S9 + S10/S13-15 climber tail; nominal +63k after half-fee, adversarially graded marginal-positive: Castrillo single-channel conf 0.39, Wærenskjold unpriced S11-12 residual ~40-80k; owner near-zero→swap directive carries it). CONSTRAINT for next runs: do NOT re-buy Wærenskjold for S11 (Girmay+Kanter carry the sprints; re-buy fee flips the sequence negative). Re-check Castrillo when S9 odds post race morning. 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide; teardown guard OK (1 sell); funded, bank after ~1.78M; 8 riders on 8 distinct teams. 3-agent adversarial verify PASS×3 (legality high, captain/swap med). matchRate 0.199 (no S9 betting market — star-boards-only fusion).

**2026-07-10 19:39Z (evening, S8 plan): CHANGED** — 1 swap: Castrillo → Wærenskjold (5.37M; 2nd on S7, eH 63k vs 10.5k; owner-calibrated test +25.7k after half-fee; Uno-X holdbonus stack with Charmig; bank after ~276k). Captain HELD Girmay (cap_ceiling 55.4k, highest owned; 3rd on S7). No DNS anywhere. GC anchor + climbing core kept (Pogacar S10 p_top15 0.64, Healy S9 0.59, Vacek S9 0.50); 1 discretionary sell — teardown guard OK. 3-agent adversarial verify: PASS×3 (one rationale note: Wærenskjold's S11-12 upside unpriced, S8-driven buy). matchRate 0.09.

2026-07-10 10:34 CEST (morning) — **HELD** S7 flat. No DNS (owned or pool). Barbell optimal: Girmay+Kanter sprinters, Pogacar anchor, Vacek GC10, 4 climbers held for S10 summit (3 out). Elite sprinters out-EV ours but cost 10.7-12.5M → funding = Pogacar teardown (guardrail + today's -464k S7 example forbid it). Cheap upgrade (Waerenskjold) only ~+8k net → skip marginal/anti-churn. C=Girmay (cap_ceiling 47k, incumbent). matchRate 0.18.

findings.detail: Captain miss on 32% of stages (avg 27024 kr left; worst: flat (avg regret 42619)). Tighten captain selection on flat stages.

improve.mergeGateExplanation: Held (not merged): the conjunctive gate (in-sample ≥ MIN AND held-out ≥ MIN AND no fold regresses) was not met — held-out is -0.23% (must be positive / above floor); at least one cross-val fold regressed; no change proposed.

strategy.essence: Maximise total team VALUE GROWTH (kr) over the whole Tour. Strategy is EV TENDENCIES, not hard rules/quotas: build the squad by maximising Σ e_horizon under the constraints (8 riders, 50M budget, max 2 per real team, 1 captain), use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership among near-equal e_horizon, and captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling. GOLD = unlimited swaps; the only friction is the 1% buy fee, so only swap when the multi-stage gain beats it. Confidence governs aggression — discount low-confidence riders.
tendencies: Maximise Σ e_horizon under the hard constraints; do not churn for sub-1%-fee gains.
Use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots so under-priced value is not overlooked.
Among near-equal e_horizon, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership.
Captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling (right-tail upside).
Concentrate variance/captaincy where stage leverage is high; prefer breadth on low-confidence stages.
Discount enriched.lowConfidence riders and fused.confidence < 0.4; matchRate governs how much to trust EV.
Respect profile_block / block_boundary look-ahead: do not dump a rider wanted again 1–3 stages later.
On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/etapebonus do not apply — value whole strong TT squads.

glossary.definition: Expected value in kr from THIS stage for a rider — Σ over placement, GC, jersey, sprint/KOM, TTT terms, minus hazard. Same kr axis the backtest scores.
Multi-stage expectation: e_stage plus discounted, hold-weighted look-ahead over the next 1–3 stages, net of the amortized 1% buy fee. The primary team-build objective.
e_horizon (net of amortized fee) per 1M kr of price — the efficiency metric for filling cheap breadth slots. Infinity if value is 0 with positive EV.
High/med/low tercile bucket of roi_per_million across the live (non-DNS) field — a quick-read value tag.
E[max(0, Δkr)] right-tail if this rider is captained this stage — the win windfall + placement upside + positive passive floor. Captain the owned rider with the highest one.
Fused stage-win probability (de-vigged odds + star/UCI/feltet signals via a weighted geometric pool), normalised so the board ~sums to 1.
Fused probability of finishing in the stage top-15 (p_stage expanded by a per-stage-type exponent). Drives etapebonus breadth.
Fused GC-strength: de-vigged GC win odds blended with a capped UCI-points prior. Paid every held stage as passive GC income.
HONEST 0–1 trust band = coverage × agreement (NOT a statistical interval). Below 0.4 the rider is flagged low-confidence; discount aggression.
Count of independent research channels that had a reading for this rider (0–5). More channels = sturdier fusion.
Fraction of the pool a LIVE source actually covered. Low pre-race (only GC odds live); rises ~24h out. Low matchRate = treat EV as weak.
Per-stage 0–1 decisive-stage weight (GC importance, volatility, summit, TT). Concentrate variance/captaincy where it is high.
Expected count of an optimal 8-man team’s riders inside the stage top-15. High on bunch days, low on selective mountain/TT days.
Grouping of consecutive similar stages + whether this stage closes the block — the 1–3 stage anti-churn look-ahead.
Holdbonus = real-team stage-finish spillover to all that team’s active riders. On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/late-arrival/etapebonus do NOT apply — value whole strong TT squads.
True when the dashboard successfully re-ran the pure fusion+EV engine to reconstruct per-rider numbers; false means it fell back to the snapshot name-lists.
